subcodes.first_line: O people of Sisan! The Pen of the Most Merciful maketh mention of you on this blessed night, through His trusted one, upon him be peace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل سیسان قلم رحمن در این لیله مبارکه شما را ذکر مینماید جناب امین علیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @high station of learning, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
